author: PoutyJinx
NODE-13
install_msg: SIN Office installed. Load it with `[p]load sinoffice`, then configure it with `[p]sinoffice setpostchannel #channel`, `[p]sinoffice setquotechannel #general`, `[p]sinoffice time 10 13`, `[p]sinoffice toggle true`, and `[p]sinoffice test`.
name: sinoffice
description: Posts automated daily SIN Corporation office announcements with lore incidents, positive CEO reminders, and optional Dweller Quotes from one configured public channel.
